name: Reasonable Cause Penalty Abatement for Vessel Registration

eligibility.description: Applies to vessel operators who failed to display proof of registration under section 4101(a)(3) but can provide a valid justification for the oversight.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can avoid the $500 monthly penalty for failing to display vessel tax registration by demonstrating the failure was due to reasonable cause.
